title: The Island’s Old Wounds Return
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #9, Hajrudin as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sooner or later, Elbaf will become a member nation of the world government.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you think shaving your head was a sign of good faith? Is that a cultural thing you got from somewhere? Voha ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Garp laughed at me too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Garp?! That guy hates the top brass!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'd also be better off as a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're a massive organization. Sure, they have corrupt trash in their ranks, but the Navy is a fine army. The average marine helps save people on a day-to-day basis!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some of them already come from Elbaf, like John Giant.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If more of our countries warriors followed suit,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They could use their boundless strength...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...To really make a difference for people everywhere!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Now that's terrifying!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why don't you talk some sense into him, IDA?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wish I could. If Harald was my son,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'd tell him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "You should choose your friends wisely!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey! Don't take shots at me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Navy HD

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "If a giant were to roll over in their sleep,"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "People could be crushed to death."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "If one just loses their temper, lives could be lost."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Do you really think humans can coexist with such creatures?"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They really said all that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that's the gist of what they told me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yep!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're fine letting 'em join the navy, but that's all, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Harald is an honest man. He's trying to learn from history and change Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: VICE ADMIRAL GARP (Luffy's Grandpa)

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: There's rumors he's being scouted by rocks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: VICE ADMIRAL SENGOKU FUTURE fleet Admiral)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: VICE ADMIRAL OTSURU (future great staff officer)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that's true, the Navy might not be able to stand against them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ADMIRAL KONG (future Commander- in-chief)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You make good points, but it is what it is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it... we're really stuck between a rock and a hard place now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, you can't deny their wild and violent track record...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THAT'S EXACTLY THE KIND OF STRENETH I'M AFTER, KONG!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just hurry and make Elbaf a member Nation already!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it were up to me, it wouldn't be an issue!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: 42 years ago - Hachinosu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is huge!! This is really huge!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is big news!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shakuyaku has quit...

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: ...as Captain of the KUja Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means there's no chance we'll run into her at sea anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It can't be...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I set sail 'cause I dreamed of being attacked by Shakuyaku's KUja Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Damn it! We've wasted our youth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shaky- Chaaaan!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 49 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
